Package space.sunqian.fs.utils.version

Interface SemVer

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<SemVer>
@Immutable public interface SemVer extends Comparable<SemVer>
This interface represents the semantic version as defined by Semantic Versioning.

A semantic version has the format MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH[-PRERELEASE][+BUILD] where:

  • MAJOR, MINOR, and PATCH are non-negative integers.
  • PRERELEASE is a dot-separated list of identifiers consisting of alphanumeric characters and hyphens ([0-9A-Za-z-]).
  • BUILD is a dot-separated list of identifiers consisting of alphanumeric characters and hyphens ([0-9A-Za-z-]).

  • Method Details

    • parse

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull SemVer parse(@Nonnull @Nonnull String version) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Parses the given string as a semantic version.
      Parameters:
      version - the string to parse
      Returns:
      the parsed semantic version
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given string is not a valid semantic version

    • of

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull SemVer of(int major, int minor, int patch)
      Creates a semantic version with the given major, minor, and patch version numbers.
      Parameters:
      major - the major version number
      minor - the minor version number
      patch - the patch version number
      Returns:
      the created semantic version

    • of

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull SemVer of(int major, int minor, int patch, @Nullable @Nullable String preRelease, @Nullable @Nullable String buildMeta) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Creates a semantic version with the given major, minor, patch version numbers, pre-release version, and build metadata.
      Parameters:
      major - the major version number
      minor - the minor version number
      patch - the patch version number
      preRelease - the pre-release version
      buildMeta - the build metadata
      Returns:
      the created semantic version
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the pre-release version or build metadata is invalid
